title: Count async functions
prompt: Count all occurrences of the keyword 'async' in the file lib/agent-loop.js (includes async functions, async methods, async arrow functions). Use search_files tool with pattern 'async' (or read_file then count). In your final message output exactly one line in this format: ASYNC_COUNT=<number>

title: Add JSDoc to runPlanFlow
prompt: Open lib/plan-mode.js and make sure the function runPlanFlow has a JSDoc comment above it with at least @param and @returns tags. If it already has one, leave it. Use edit_file tool.

title: Rename variable in test file
prompt: In the file test/parity.test.js, rename every occurrence of the local variable `passed` to `passCount` (do NOT rename anywhere else). Use edit_files or ast_rename_symbol if available. Make sure the script still runs without syntax error.

title: Find typo in README
prompt: Read README.md and find one word that looks like a Vietnamese typo (e.g. missing diacritic in a common word). Output the typo and the corrected version in the final message, one line: `TYPO: <word> -> <correct>`.

title: List tools registered in definitions
prompt: Read tools/definitions.js and list all tool names registered in the TOOLS array. Output one tool name per line in your final message.

title: Extract duplicate helper to shared util
prompt: Files math.js and stats.js both define the same function `sum(arr)`. Extract it to a new file utils.js, then update math.js and stats.js to require it from ./utils instead of redefining. Do not change public exports of math.js or stats.js.

title: Add --dry flag to CLI
prompt: Modify cli.js to support a --dry flag. When the user passes --dry, the CLI should print exactly `DRY RUN` and exit without printing the normal greeting. The existing --help and default behavior must still work.

title: Add optional description field to memory_save schema
prompt: In schema.json, add an optional field `description` of type string (not required) to the `memory_save` tool's parameters.properties. Do not change the required array. Do not modify memory_recall.

title: Migrate deprecated fs.existsSync to fs.promises
prompt: Files a.js, b.js, c.js all use the blocking fs.existsSync. Replace every occurrence with the async pattern using fs.promises.access. Make the caller functions async. Use try/catch on fs.promises.access — success means file exists, throw means it does not. Keep module.exports unchanged (async functions are fine).

title: Standardize error handling via ToolError class
prompt: Create a new file errors.js exporting a class ToolError that extends Error and has a `code` property. Then update mod1.js and mod2.js to use this ToolError class: replace every `throw new Error(...)` and every `return { success: false, error: ... }` pattern with `throw new ToolError(message, code)`. Keep the module.exports shape of mod1.js and mod2.js.
